languages.text: {n}Померкнувшая было проекция Тразина вспыхивает с новой силой, а в обычно отстраненном голосе ксеноса появляются возмущенные нотки:{/n} "Не может быть... Ноктюрн Забвения? Нахальный Солитер каким-то образом удрал из моей коллекции, чтобы разгуливать по задворкам галактики!" {n}Некрон скрежещет чем-то, что заменяет ему голосовой аппарат, в бессильном раздражении.{/n} "Что ж... я найду на него повторную управу... когда-нибудь".

{n}Trazyn's dim projection now flares up with renewed force, and a hint of indignation has seeped into the xenos's usually detached voice:{/n} "It cannot be... Nocturne of Oblivion? That impudent Solitaire has somehow escaped my collection to strut about the backwaters of the galaxy!" {n}Toothless irritation rattles through whatever the Necron has in place of a voice box.{/n} "Well... I will bring him to heel again... someday."

Нахальный Солитер каким-то образом удрал из моей коллекции, чтобы разгуливать по задворкам галактики!" {n}Некрон скрежещет чем-то, что заменяет ему голосовой аппарат, в бессильном раздражении.{/n} "Что ж... я найду на него повторную управу... когда-нибудь".

That impudent Solitaire has somehow escaped my collection to strut about the backwaters of the galaxy!" {n}Toothless irritation rattles through whatever the Necron has in place of a voice box.{/n} "Well... I will bring him to heel again... someday."

languages.text: {n}La tenue proyección de Trazyn cobra nuevas fuerzas y notas un toque de indignación en la voz del xenos, por lo general impasible:{/n} «No puede ser... ¿Nocturno del Olvido? ¡Ese atrevido Solitario se ha escapado de mi colección para recorrer los lugares más recónditos de la galaxia!». {n}La irritación del Necrón brota impotente desde lo que quiera que use para hablar.{/n} «Que así sea... Haré que vuelva a su lugar... algún día».
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's dim projection now flares up with renewed force, and a hint of indignation has seeped into the xenos's usually detached voice:{/n} "It cannot be... Nocturne of Oblivion? That impudent Solitaire has somehow escaped my collection to strut about the backwaters of the galaxy!" {n}Toothless irritation rattles through whatever the Necron has in place of a voice box.{/n} "Well... I will bring him to heel again... someday."

traits.locale_text: {n}La tenue proyección de Trazyn cobra nuevas fuerzas y notas un toque de indignación en la voz del xenos, por lo general impasible:{/n} «No puede ser... ¿Nocturno del Olvido? ¡Ese atrevido Solitario se ha escapado de mi colección para recorrer los lugares más recónditos de la galaxia!». {n}La irritación del Necrón brota impotente desde lo que quiera que use para hablar.{/n} «Que así sea... Haré que vuelva a su lugar... algún día».

languages.text: {n}特拉金那黯淡的投影猛然一亮，他一贯疏离的声音里，隐约透出一丝不悦：{/n}“这怎么可能是……‘遗忘夜曲’？那个放肆的独角竟不知用什么法子逃出了我的藏品库，跑到这银河的穷乡僻壤招摇过市！”{n}一阵空洞而无力的恼怒，从这个太空死灵那不知名的发声装置中震颤而出。{/n}“也罢……总有一天，我会让他再次俯首。”
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's dim projection now flares up with renewed force, and a hint of indignation has seeped into the xenos's usually detached voice:{/n} "It cannot be... Nocturne of Oblivion? That impudent Solitaire has somehow escaped my collection to strut about the backwaters of the galaxy!" {n}Toothless irritation rattles through whatever the Necron has in place of a voice box.{/n} "Well... I will bring him to heel again... someday."

traits.locale_text: {n}特拉金那黯淡的投影猛然一亮，他一贯疏离的声音里，隐约透出一丝不悦：{/n}“这怎么可能是……‘遗忘夜曲’？那个放肆的独角竟不知用什么法子逃出了我的藏品库，跑到这银河的穷乡僻壤招摇过市！”{n}一阵空洞而无力的恼怒，从这个太空死灵那不知名的发声装置中震颤而出。{/n}“也罢……总有一天，我会让他再次俯首。”

languages.text: {n}La projection de Trazyn semble devenir plus nette alors que la voix habituellement blasée de l'extraterrestre se teinte d'une pointe d'indignation.{/n} « C'est impossible... Nocturne de l'Oubli ? Ce Solitaire effronté s'est échappé de ma collection pour se pavaner dans les confins de la galaxie ! » {n}Une irritation sourde résonne dans ce qui tient lieu de cordes vocales au Nécron.{/n} « Eh bien... Il retrouvera sa place... un jour. »
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's dim projection now flares up with renewed force, and a hint of indignation has seeped into the xenos's usually detached voice:{/n} "It cannot be... Nocturne of Oblivion? That impudent Solitaire has somehow escaped my collection to strut about the backwaters of the galaxy!" {n}Toothless irritation rattles through whatever the Necron has in place of a voice box.{/n} "Well... I will bring him to heel again... someday."

traits.locale_text: {n}La projection de Trazyn semble devenir plus nette alors que la voix habituellement blasée de l'extraterrestre se teinte d'une pointe d'indignation.{/n} « C'est impossible... Nocturne de l'Oubli ? Ce Solitaire effronté s'est échappé de ma collection pour se pavaner dans les confins de la galaxie ! » {n}Une irritation sourde résonne dans ce qui tient lieu de cordes vocales au Nécron.{/n} « Eh bien... Il retrouvera sa place... un jour. »

languages.text: {n}Trazyn'in loş projeksiyonu, yeniden güce kavuşmuş vaziyette parlıyor. Zenonun genellikle tarafsız çıkan sesinde öfke duyuluyor.{/n} "Olamaz... Nisyan Noktürnü mü? Küstah Kaçkın, bir şekilde koleksiyonum kaçmış. Şimdi de galaksinin ücra köşelerinde kurum satıyor!" {n}Nekron'un ses kutusu yerine sahip olduğu şeyden bir öfke çatırtısı saçılıyor.{/n} "Öyle olsun... Bir gün yine boyun eğecek."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's dim projection now flares up with renewed force, and a hint of indignation has seeped into the xenos's usually detached voice:{/n} "It cannot be... Nocturne of Oblivion? That impudent Solitaire has somehow escaped my collection to strut about the backwaters of the galaxy!" {n}Toothless irritation rattles through whatever the Necron has in place of a voice box.{/n} "Well... I will bring him to heel again... someday."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn'in loş projeksiyonu, yeniden güce kavuşmuş vaziyette parlıyor. Zenonun genellikle tarafsız çıkan sesinde öfke duyuluyor.{/n} "Olamaz... Nisyan Noktürnü mü? Küstah Kaçkın, bir şekilde koleksiyonum kaçmış. Şimdi de galaksinin ücra köşelerinde kurum satıyor!" {n}Nekron'un ses kutusu yerine sahip olduğu şeyden bir öfke çatırtısı saçılıyor.{/n} "Öyle olsun... Bir gün yine boyun eğecek."

languages.text: {n}Trazyns schwache Projektion flackert mit neuer Kraft auf, während sich in seine ansonsten so gleichgültige Stimme ein Hauch von Verärgerung schleicht:{/n} "Das kann nicht sein ... Nokturne des Vergessens? Dieser unverschämte Solitär ist irgendwie aus meiner Sammlung entkommen, um in den hintersten Winkeln der Galaxis herumzustolzieren!" {n}Zahnlose Verärgerung rasselt durch die nicht vorhandene Sprachbox des Necrons.{/n} "Tja ... Ich mache ihn schon wieder gefügig ... irgendwann."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's dim projection now flares up with renewed force, and a hint of indignation has seeped into the xenos's usually detached voice:{/n} "It cannot be... Nocturne of Oblivion? I will bring him to heel again... someday."

Nokturne des Vergessens? Dieser unverschämte Solitär ist irgendwie aus meiner Sammlung entkommen, um in den hintersten Winkeln der Galaxis herumzustolzieren!" {n}Zahnlose Verärgerung rasselt durch die nicht vorhandene Sprachbox des Necrons.{/n} "Tja ... Ich mache ihn schon wieder gefügig ... irgendwann."

languages.text: {n}今やトラジンの淡い投影が新たな力をもって燃え上がり、普段は超然とした異種族の声に、かすかな憤りがにじむ。{/n}「まさか…〈忘却のノクターン〉だと？あの不遜なソリティアめ、よもや我がコレクションから逃れ出て、銀河の僻地をのし歩いていようとはな！」{n}歯のない苛立ちが、ネクロンの声帯に代わる何かを通してガラガラと響く。{/n}「ふむ…いつの日か…再び奴を従わせてくれよう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn's dim projection now flares up with renewed force, and a hint of indignation has seeped into the xenos's usually detached voice:{/n} "It cannot be... Nocturne of Oblivion? That impudent Solitaire has somehow escaped my collection to strut about the backwaters of the galaxy!" {n}Toothless irritation rattles through whatever the Necron has in place of a voice box.{/n} "Well... I will bring him to heel again... someday."

traits.locale_text: {n}今やトラジンの淡い投影が新たな力をもって燃え上がり、普段は超然とした異種族の声に、かすかな憤りがにじむ。{/n}「まさか…〈忘却のノクターン〉だと？あの不遜なソリティアめ、よもや我がコレクションから逃れ出て、銀河の僻地をのし歩いていようとはな！」{n}歯のない苛立ちが、ネクロンの声帯に代わる何かを通してガラガラと響く。{/n}「ふむ…いつの日か…再び奴を従わせてくれよう。」
